_comment: 分镜/翻译中间产物（由会话生成）。build.mjs 读它 → 配音+出图+manifest。改这里即改内容。

shots.content: A cozy little bedroom in soft warm morning sunlight; the chubby boy in the yellow hoodie and the chubby girl in the coral-red dress are just waking up, rubbing their eyes and stretching, sleepy and happy and cute.

captions.zh: 早晨，阳光照进小屋，胖乎乎的哥哥和妹妹醒来啦。
captions.pinyin: zǎochén, yángguāng zhào jìn xiǎo wū, pànghūhū de gēge hé mèimei xǐng lái la.
captions.local: Buổi sáng, nắng chiếu vào nhà, anh trai và em gái mũm mĩm thức dậy rồi.

beats.action: holding a phone, speaking out loud

shots.content: The chubby boy in the yellow hoodie holding a smartphone in both hands, mouth open speaking happily and confidently, cheerful and proud.

captions.zh: 哥哥打开手机，跟着大声说：你好！
captions.pinyin: gēge dǎkāi shǒujī, gēnzhe dàshēng shuō: nǐ hǎo!
captions.local: Anh trai mở điện thoại, đọc to theo: Xin chào!

shots.content: The chubby little girl in the coral-red dress standing cutely, mouth open speaking sweetly, little hands together, adorable and proud.

captions.zh: 妹妹也不甘示弱，奶声奶气地念：谢谢！
captions.pinyin: mèimei yě bùgān shìruò, nǎishēng nǎiqì de niàn: xièxie!
captions.local: Em gái cũng không chịu kém, bi bô đọc theo: Cảm ơn!

beats.action: dad thumbs up, mom carrying a breakfast tray

shots.content: The dad giving a big thumbs up with a warm proud smile, next to the chubby mom in the deep-green dress carrying a tray with steaming breakfast bowls; a simple cozy kitchen.

captions.zh: 爸爸竖起大拇指，妈妈端来香喷喷的早餐。
captions.pinyin: bàba shù qǐ dàmǔzhǐ, māma duān lái xiāngpēnpēn de zǎocān.
captions.local: Bố giơ ngón tay cái, mẹ bưng tới bữa sáng thơm phức.

shots.content: The cute grey-and-white bulldog puppy tilting its head curiously to one side, big sweet eyes, as if listening and eager to learn.

captions.zh: 连小狗都歪着头，好像也想学说中文。
captions.pinyin: lián xiǎo gǒu dōu wāizhe tóu, hǎoxiàng yě xiǎng xué shuō zhōngwén.
captions.local: Đến chú cún cũng nghiêng đầu, như muốn học nói tiếng Trung.

beats.action: whole family smiling side by side

shots.content: The whole happy family together — the dad, the chubby mom in the deep-green dress, the chubby boy in yellow, the chubby girl in coral-red, and the little grey-and-white bulldog — all smiling warmly side by side, cozy togetherness.

captions.zh: 一家人每天一起学，中文越来越棒！
captions.pinyin: yìjiā rén měitiān yìqǐ xué, zhōngwén yuèláiyuè bàng!
captions.local: Cả nhà mỗi ngày cùng học, tiếng Trung ngày càng giỏi!

shots.content: The chubby boy in yellow and the chubby girl in coral-red waving happily at the viewer, joyful and inviting, cheerful celebratory mood with a few simple sparkle dots around them.

captions.zh: 快和全家一起，轻松学中文吧！
captions.pinyin: kuài hé quánjiā yìqǐ, qīngsōng xué zhōngwén ba!
captions.local: Hãy cùng cả nhà học tiếng Trung thật dễ dàng nào!
